name: PJSC ALROSA-Nyurba
summary: PJSC ALROSA-Nyurba engages in the mining of diamonds in Russia. It holds the mining licenses for the Nyurbinskoye and Botuobinskoye primary deposits in the Nyurba District of the Republic of Sakha. The company was formerly known as Open Joint Stock Company ALROSA-Nyurba and changed its name to PJSC ALROSA-Nyurba in December 2015. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Moscow, Russia. PJSC ALROSA-Nyurba is a subsidiary of Public Joint Stock Company ALROSA.
